SMART FEATURES: Designed with high-quality materials and a color-calibrated HD display, the Aura Carver landscape frame automatically adjusts screen brightness, manages photo cropping, turns off automatically at night, and more. Includes built-in speaker for video playback. PERFECT FOR GIFTING: Add photos, videos, and a gift message to this Aura smart frame in the app before sending for a personalized, one-of-a-kind gift.
